classification_reason: Spatial provides advanced 3D software solutions primarily used by developers in engineering applications. The primary end users are automotive engineers and developers who build and integrate these systems into vehicles, aligning with the engineering function of building and securing technical systems.

The presence of API documentation indicates that the product is intended for technical users in the engineering function.
